agent_workflow_stages.description: Established the canonical Zod schema, versioned JSON storage, and immutable 100-app benchmark dictionary from data/benchmark_100.json.
Executed comprehensive 4-stage deep verification (Discovery -> Extraction -> Evidence Validation -> Critic Audit) across 10 stratified sample applications.

agent_workflow_stages.stage_name: Phase 3: Fast Scale One-Pass Production Execution
agent_workflow_stages.description: Executed high-throughput single-pass extraction across the remaining 90 applications with deterministic evidence validation and conservative risk guardrails.
Independently audited a 15-app stratified sample across both modes, confirming 97.5% post-verification accuracy and diagnosing conservative guardrails.

agent_workflow_stages.stage_name: Phase 5: Final Dataset Calibration & Provenance Audit
agent_workflow_stages.description: Applied zero-LLM local deterministic recalibration + 15 targeted LLM verification checks on borderline apps, establishing strict 4-tier provenance.

methodology_and_provenance_definitions.independently_verified: Applications verified during our independent 15-app stratified audit (data/verification/app_*_verified.json) using fresh official sources crawled via FastCheerioFetcherProvider and evaluated by gemini-2.5-flash without altering baseline records.
methodology_and_provenance_definitions.targeted_verified: High-value borderline applications verified during Part 4 targeted verification (data/calibrated/targeted_verified/app_*_targeted.json) where specific unresolved material fields were re-audited via a dedicated LLM call with fresh documentation.
methodology_and_provenance_definitions.deterministically_calibrated: Applications whose buildability verdicts changed cleanly via local deterministic rules (Part 2) where raw baseline facts (public_api: 'yes', credentials_obtainable_without_approval: true) satisfied exact evidence-backed thresholds without requiring an additional LLM call.
methodology_and_provenance_definitions.baseline_unverified: Applications whose raw initial extraction facts and verdicts were retained without external LLM verification or recalibration changes (0 false human verification claims).
methodology_and_provenance_definitions.genuinely_unresolved_verified: Applications (exactly 7) that underwent independent or targeted verification but remained UNCLEAR due to true structural ambiguity, multi-tenant gating, or waitlisted API access.
methodology_and_provenance_definitions.baseline_unverified_conservative_unclear: Applications (exactly 54) that remained UNCLEAR in the final presentation layer (baseline_unverified provenance) where public_api: 'yes' is largely present, but conservative Fast Scale guardrails were preserved to honor strict provenance integrity.

top_five_patterns.headline: Self-Serve Developer APIs & CRM Ecosystems Drive Immediate Buildability
top_five_patterns.supporting_metric: BUILD_NOW accounts for exactly 20 apps (20.0%) across 5 distinct categories, led by CRM and Sales (5 apps) and Developer/Infra platforms (4 apps).

top_five_patterns.headline: Security-Sensitive Enterprise, Legal, and B2B SaaS Require Manual Sales Outreach
top_five_patterns.supporting_metric: OUTREACH_REQUIRED accounts for exactly 12 apps (12.0%) across 7 categories, where sales approval or partner agreements block immediate self-serve developer access.

top_five_patterns.headline: Explicit API Keys and OAuth 2.0 Form the Dual Pillars of Modern API Authentication
top_five_patterns.supporting_metric: Among resolved developer integrations, exact API Key authentication (12 apps) and OAuth 2.0 (13 apps) constitute the dominant industry standards, alongside Bearer Token (8 apps).

top_five_patterns.headline: Broad REST API Availability Exceeds Nascent Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server Adoption
top_five_patterns.supporting_metric: Exactly 75 apps confirm public API availability (55 confirming broad surface area), yet only 28 apps offer official MCP server support versus 65 showing none found.

top_five_patterns.headline: Conservative Single-Pass Guardrails — Not Documentation Hallucinations — Account for the Bulk of UNCLEAR Verdicts
top_five_patterns.supporting_metric: Independent verification confirmed that 71.4% of sampled UNCLEAR baseline verdicts were false-positives forced by conservative string-matching guardrails. In the final dataset, exactly 54 apps remain marked baseline-unverified conservative UNCLEAR, alongside only 7 genuinely unresolved verified apps.
